candidate_definition_hints.text: A command-line utility for processing JSON-LD, RDF, RDFC, JCS, CBOR-LD, and multiformats with native executables for Ubuntu, macOS, and Windows - completely free of JVM dependencies.
A simple command-line utility designed to process JSON-LD, RDF, CBOR-LD, and multiformats documents.
